key_evidence: OHCHR Independent Expert Mechanism completed 11-day visit May 4-14 to Bogotá, Quibdó, Cartagena, Cali
Preliminary finding: systemic and structural racism against people of African descent is not isolated incidents but entrenched system
Recommendations include structural reform of National Police, civilian ministry transfer, accountability for racial discrimination and police violence
Urgent address of humanitarian crisis in transitional detention centers identified
Full findings to UN HRC September/October session — primary apply trigger pending
